title: Primitives & annotations
description: string, number, boolean, and how annotations look.

questions.prompt: What does TS infer for x?
questions.explanation: const gives a literal type; let would widen to number.

options: any disables all checks; unknown forces you to narrow before use
questions.explanation: Prefer unknown at boundaries — safer default.

questions.prompt: Which is NOT a primitive type?
questions.explanation: Objects and arrays are not primitives (bigint and symbol are).

options: No — string not assignable to number
